career_angle: LLM developments affect every developer. Understand the capabilities and limitations - knowing what AI can't do is as valuable as knowing what it can.

factors.name: Source Authority
factors.rationale: 'Context Graphs: Hype or actually Trillion-dollar opportun...' -- AI News (smol.ai) is unclassified or low-reliability source (tier_5, reliability: 20%)

factors.name: Evidence Quality
factors.rationale: mentions benchmarks or datasets; specific figures cited: 'achieving over **70%'

factors.name: Reproducibility
factors.rationale: 'Context Graphs: Hype or actually Trillion-dollar opportun...' -- no code, methodology, or reproducibility details provided

factors.name: Conflict of Interest
factors.rationale: 'Context Graphs: Hype or actually Trillion-dollar opportun...' -- no overt promotional language from AI News (smol.ai), but independence not confirmed

factors.name: Consensus
factors.rationale: 'Context Graphs: Hype or actually Trillion-dollar opportun...' -- not cross-referenced against external expert consensus

factors.name: Track Record
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) -- insufficient history to assess
